---
title: "Comparison"
author: "UIAO Modernization Program"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
  pdf: default
  gfm: default
---

# Legacy vs. Modernized Infrastructure

To move at the speed of the agency's mission, we must transition away from manual, ticket-based workflows to an automated, policy-driven model.

## The Transformation
The diagram below contrasts our current "Siloed" state with the "Unified" model implemented by the uiao-core project.

![Legacy vs Modernized](./images/legacy_vs_modern.png)

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPLjQzim58M_-rTSiYyTDCt6DXWZb2f-6G7dXJhRs0WKnRxrH6KfI7ARTVI_JtBin6wpfFaWC7hErT4vWbnfGvKf2-xfEoRMLD42LZIzovKiHUPBBXMyYQfVYyZmbfRSH5AOAIqGY6AqFO4e9HzgyVlH1_B9RssEfCfG_MzNOMgeo3aUnzRM8yrFG4AQ4mH93RjdviznofV5MWeKvfNMNIudZ1z36bD76PVmCM2Vu_Csmy_HkoWyaEKBS1HzxDI-I-lao7rY9z606hgY-XK-iuOyq89NNm9wSVYL-3yXMP1526SJAahApo5XN69s3f6YEUFujWT_lLr4qDjkmpYpbkq5bu84WvdepnKMFQ0QufjnqEQtOs4y9vEb23SfSaZM2cccVoCQNMl8f7E6eOQbCBj7nQaz8c8RU-Jtc4prmEN5SGF4ZnlnRDuMEz-5DMSL2-HOe55sn3LILmaEQZ-np1lvOk8vqt1nSRbrufRwouvsI_rboQVEtQHDLx17wrOA88PJlHHd9QEodqhbehC7TA2AQOzmy4rX4Lx1-q_lfGxw_SiM0L-0b4OM5R1lTJ8Bmklf-5SODCtk3C4tmMwP3SRDvbMpEzcSKu7wMTbDor3jBaMZ9u-bmi4u2IlJtS99bYdKcecyKTKktQiHjtB5vQQITJklosuqSoLp-v8BkhARIK06IV23J2kTxQJJmgxbbhOks-TIOzQFfLnNqaNdIDlviBu033stL0bt8ViKXhLT2xdb06HVoB3sPY6tDD2JTuKYi_yQ_m00)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

### Key Value Transitions
| Capability | Legacy State | Modernized (uiao-core) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Provisioning** | Manual (Hours/Days) | Automated (Minutes) |
| **Policy** | Static (VLAN-based) | Dynamic (Identity-based) |
| **Visibility** | Reactive (Logs) | Proactive (Telemetry Loops) |
| **Scaling** | Bespoke / Per-site | Standardized / Pattern-based |
